node.text: Deborah traveled to Bali last year, one of her favorite places, for peace and yoga.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "traveled to country") on Observation 3 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Deborah took a beautiful photo on one of her excursions in Rio de Janeiro three years ago.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "traveled to country") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: A photo of the last hike with her friend Karlie brings a smile to Deborah's face whenever she sees it.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "traveled to country") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: Deborah visited her mom's house last month, which holds a special place in her heart as a symbol of her mom's strength and love.

node.text: Deborah has a favorite spot where she goes to ponder and let things go.

node.text: Deborah attended a yoga retreat near her mom's place last week and found it life-changing.

node.text: Deborah went to a cool event last week aimed at supporting each other.

node.text: Deborah finds peace and comfort in roses and dahlias in her garden after losing a friend last week.
Deborah received a quote from a friend that says "Let go of what no longer serves you."
Deborah was curious to hear more about Jolene's reflections from the meditation retreat and how they changed her.
